description: Justin Wang discusses Zeus Network's approach to bridging Bitcoin and Solana, emphasizing its role as a communication layer rather than a traditional layer 2 solution. He explains how Zeus enables programmability for UTXO chains on Solana, addressing liquidity fragmentation and usability concerns.
topic_summary: In this episode, Justin Wang explains how Zeus Network acts as a layer 1.5 solution, allowing Bitcoin and other UTXO assets to be programmable on Solana. He contrasts this with traditional sidechains and discusses the importance of sustainable yield in blockchain ecosystems [t=0:24-353:52].
